remediation_issues.title: Vague form prompt confused student
remediation_issues.evidence_source: Student 1 manual note and 2026-04-29 pilot observation summary issue p3_pilot_2026_04_29_001
remediation_issues.likely_root_cause: The prompt uses the abstract term form without saying whether the student should identify tense, verb form, or visible word pattern.
remediation_issues.recommended_action: Replace or test proposed student-facing wording that names the intended skill and avoids the bare word form.
tests_recommended: wording template regression for verb_tense prompts
pilot evidence regression asserting the old vague phrase is not used for this lane

remediation_issues.title: Prefix prompt did not make the target action clear
remediation_issues.affected_example: What is the prefix in בְּאִשְׁתּוֹ?
remediation_issues.evidence_source: Student 3 exported/session evidence and 2026-04-29 pilot observation summary issue p3_pilot_2026_04_29_006
remediation_issues.likely_root_cause: The question asks for a prefix but does not visually isolate the letter or explain that the student should look for the small beginning letter added before the main word.
remediation_issues.recommended_action: Prepare clearer wording and possibly visual highlighting or answer-choice formatting for prefix identification.

remediation_issues.title: Shoresh/source follow-up needed for ASHIS / SHIS
remediation_issues.affected_example: Student questioned whether שית is the root word for אָשִׁית.
remediation_issues.evidence_source: Student 1 manual note, Student 3 session evidence, and 2026-04-29 pilot observation summary issues p3_pilot_2026_04_29_003 and p3_pilot_2026_04_29_008
remediation_issues.likely_root_cause: The source/teacher authority for presenting this as a beginner shoresh item is not yet settled from the pilot evidence alone.
remediation_issues.recommended_action: Ask Yossi/source reviewer whether this shoresh answer is pedagogically and source-wise appropriate for this level; suppress or avoid the item until answered.
tests_recommended: source-follow-up fixture marking this target blocked until reviewed
shoresh candidate validation regression if a suppression rule is later approved

remediation_issues.title: DERECH translation distractors were flagged as bad
remediation_issues.evidence_source: Student 3 exported/session evidence and 2026-04-29 pilot observation summary issue p3_pilot_2026_04_29_007
remediation_issues.likely_root_cause: Translation distractors may be semantically or pedagogically mismatched for an isolated-word meaning question.
remediation_issues.recommended_action: Audit the answer choices for this token and add tests for plausible-but-not-misleading translation distractors before changing any bank/generator behavior.
tests_recommended: translation distractor quality test for the flagged token

remediation_issues.title: ARURAH translation distractors were flagged as bad
remediation_issues.affected_example: Translation question for אֲרוּרָה; Student 1 selected Eve while expected answer was cursed.
remediation_issues.evidence_source: Student 1 and Student 2 manual notes plus 2026-04-29 pilot observation summary issues p3_pilot_2026_04_29_002 and p3_pilot_2026_04_29_005
remediation_issues.likely_root_cause: At least one distractor appears to be from a different semantic/person category, which can measure confusion or guessing rather than the intended vocabulary skill.
remediation_issues.recommended_action: Inspect and repair this token's distractor set first, with a teacher-visible before/after note and regression tests.
tests_recommended: translation distractor quality test for ARURAH

remediation_issues.title: Phrase-translation distractors need a focused audit
remediation_issues.affected_example: Most phrase questions seemed to have bad distractors.
remediation_issues.pasuk_ref_if_known: Student 1 Q7, Q8, Q10 refs not_available from summary
remediation_issues.evidence_source: Student 1 manual note and 2026-04-29 pilot observation summary issue p3_pilot_2026_04_29_004
remediation_issues.likely_root_cause: Phrase choices may be borrowed from single-word translation logic or otherwise not matched for phrase length, syntax, and context plausibility.
remediation_issues.recommended_action: Run a dedicated phrase-translation answer-choice audit before changing generator behavior; inspect whether distractors differ by phrase structure and not just vocabulary surface.
